title: Payments Kafka lag discussion
content: Thread summary: during the July 12 settlement replay, payments-platform noted that HighKafkaConsumerLag may rise temporarily while replay is active. The recommended temporary mitigation was to confirm replay status before restarting pods. If replay is active and lag slope is decreasing, continue monitoring for 15 minutes before restarting. If lag slope increases, follow the Confluence one-pod restart workflow.
